name: Kibbet Batata Bi Sanieh - Potato Kibbi
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub and cook potatoes in boiling, salted water until tender. Peel and mash.
2. Place bulgur in a fine sieve and rinse with cold water. Press with the back of a spoon to extract moisture, then turn into a large bowl and leave for 15 minutes.
3. Add mashed potatoes, grated onion, parsley, mint, cinnamon, salt, and black pepper to the bulgur mixture. Mix well, tasting and adding more salt if necessary.
4. Knead the mixture with your hands, moistening it occasionally with water. If the mixture is too soft, add enough flour to make a firm paste, kneading well.
5. Spread the potato paste evenly over sliced onions in a baking dish or oven-safe serving dish.
6. Dot the top of the potato paste with some olive oil.
7. Bake in a hot oven for 40 minutes or until golden brown. Let cool in the dish before serving at room temperature, or serve immediately if desired.
Good served hot, in which case allow to cool for 10 minutes before serving.
